use_cases: AI-powered text transformation with selectable options like Summarize, Correct Grammar, and Compress
Message refinement interface for drafting and editing text content
Input field for AI chat or text processing applications
ai_summary: An AI prompt box component featuring an auto-resizing textarea with selectable text transformation options (Summarize, Correct Grammar, Compress). The interface displays contextual badges with icons and colors based on the selected transformation mode. Built with clean minimalist styling suitable for modern SaaS and AI-powered text editing applications.
